_comment: EX-09 Versus Monsters — self-contained (supplies packsPerBox). Bandai product description confirms 24 packs x 12 cards per box (packsPerBox was previously 12 — a bug, corrected 2026-07-03 after user caught the same error while adding EX-12). Hit rates below are user-confirmed real-world pull rates, not derived estimates. SP and Rare Pull share the same case-hit pool (never both in one case) — 2026-07-04 fix: split the 1/15-box combined pool 1:1 instead of letting SP inherit the unrelated default rate on top of Rare Pull's rate. Pull rates are placeholder pending further verification.

Alt Art._comment: ~2.5 per box — user-confirmed range 2-3/box, midpoint used

Limited Foil._comment: ~1 per box — user-confirmed (older EX sets; EX-12 is 2/box)

SP._comment: ~1 per 30 boxes — half of the 1/15-box pool shared with Rare Pull, split 1:1

Rare Pull._comment: ~1 per 30 boxes — half of the 1/15-box pool shared with SP, split 1:1; $118+ avg
